channel.title: OpenHarmony — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by OpenHarmony (openharmony).

item.title: CVE-2026-33565 · 3.3 LOW — kernel_linux_common_modules has a Race Condition vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v6.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS.

item.title: CVE-2026-28733 · 6.5 MEDIUM — filemanagement_storage_service has an use after free vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v6.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker arbitrary code execution.

item.title: CVE-2026-27766 · 5.5 MEDIUM — multimedia_audio_framework has a Race Condition vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v6.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause information leak.

item.title: CVE-2026-25850 · 5.5 MEDIUM — filemanagement_storage_service has an improper preservation of permissions vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v6.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause information leak

item.title: CVE-2026-25781 · 8.4 HIGH — kernel_liteos_a has an out-of-bounds write vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v6.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS and it cannot be recovered.

item.title: CVE-2026-28751 · 3.3 LOW — filemanagement_storage_service has an improper input validation vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v6.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS.

item.title: CVE-2026-27781 · 3.3 LOW — kernel_liteos_a has an integer overflow vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v6.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS.

item.title: CVE-2026-27648 · 8.8 HIGH — web_webview has an out-of-bounds write vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v6.0 and prior versions allow a remote attacker arbitrary code execution in pre-installed apps.

item.title: CVE-2026-25110 · 3.3 LOW — Sensors_medical_sensor has a NULL pointer dereference vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v6.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS.

item.title: CVE-2026-24792 · 8.1 HIGH — web_webview has a Race Condition vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v6.0 and prior versions allow a remote attacker arbitrary code execution in pre-installed apps.

item.title: CVE-2025-6969 · 5 MEDIUM — ability_ability_runtime an improper input validation vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.1.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS through improper input.

item.title: CVE-2025-26474 · 3.3 LOW — communication_ipc an improper input validation vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause information improper input. This vulnerability can be exploited only in restricted scenarios.

item.title: CVE-2025-52458 · 5.5 MEDIUM — arkcompiler_ets_runtime has an out-of-bounds write vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.1.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker arbitrary code execution in pre-installed apps through out-of-bounds write. This vulnerability can be exploited only in restricted scenarios.

item.title: CVE-2025-41432 · 5.5 MEDIUM — arkcompiler_ets_runtime has an out-of-bounds write vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.1.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker arbitrary code execution in pre-installed apps through out-of-bounds write. This vulnerability can be exploited only in restricted scenarios.

item.title: CVE-2025-25277 · 6.3 MEDIUM — arkcompiler_ets_runtime has a type confusion vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.1.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker arbitrary code execution in pre-installed apps through using incompatible type. This vulnerability can be exploited only in restricted scenarios.

item.title: CVE-2025-12736 · 6.5 MEDIUM — multimedia_audio_standard has an insecure storage of sensitive information vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker case sensitive information leak through use of uninitialized resource.

item.title: CVE-2026-0639 · 3.3 LOW — liteos_a has a missing release of memory vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v6.0 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through missing release of memory.

item.title: CVE-2025-27562 · 3.3 LOW — communication_dsoftbus has a missing release of memory vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through missing release of memory.

item.title: CVE-2025-27128 · 8.4 HIGH — liteos_a has an UAF vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker arbitrary code execution in tcb through use after free.

item.title: CVE-2025-25212 · 3.3 LOW — pasteboard has an improper input vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through improper input.

item.title: CVE-2025-24844 · 3.3 LOW — communication_dsoftbus has a missing release of memory vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through missing release of memory.

item.title: CVE-2025-27536 · 3.3 LOW — arkcompiler_ets_runtime has a type confusion vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS through type confusion.

item.title: CVE-2025-26690 · 3.3 LOW — communication dsoftbus has a NULL pointer vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through NULL pointer dereference.

item.title: CVE-2025-24925 · 3.3 LOW — applications_settings has a missing release of memory vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through missing release of memory.

item.title: CVE-2025-24298 · 8.4 HIGH — liteos_a has an UAF vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker arbitrary code execution in tcb through use after free.

item.title: CVE-2025-25278 · 8.4 HIGH — liteos_a has a race condition vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker arbitrary code execution in tcb through race condition.

item.title: CVE-2025-27577 · 8.4 HIGH — liteos_a has a race condition vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker arbitrary code execution in tcb through race condition.

item.title: CVE-2025-27247 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Pasteboard has an improper preservation of permissions vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause information leak through get permission.

item.title: CVE-2025-27242 · 3.3 LOW — Ssecurity_component_manager has an improper input vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS through improper input.

item.title: CVE-2025-27563 · 3.3 LOW — security_access_token has an improper preservation of permissions vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause information leak through get permission.

item.title: CVE-2025-26693 · 3.3 LOW — security_access_token has an improper preservation of permissions vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause information leak through get permission.

item.title: CVE-2025-26691 · 5.5 MEDIUM — telephony_call_manager has an improper preservation of permissions vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause information leak through get permission.

item.title: CVE-2025-27131 · 6.1 MEDIUM — kernel_liteos_m has an improper input vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS through improper input.

item.title: CVE-2025-24493 · 5.5 MEDIUM — kernel_liteos_a has a race condition vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause information leak through race condition.

item.title: CVE-2025-25217 · 3.3 LOW — arkui_ace_enginehas a NULL pointer dereference vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through NULL pointer dereference.

item.title: CVE-2025-23235 · 3.3 LOW — arkcompiler_ets_runtime has an out-of-bounds write vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS through out-of-bounds read.

item.title: CVE-2025-21082 · 3.3 LOW — arkui_ace_engine has a type confusion vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause apps crash through type confusion.

item.title: CVE-2025-20063 · 3.3 LOW — arkui_ace_engine has a type confusion vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause apps crash through type confusion.

item.title: CVE-2025-25052 · 3.3 LOW — arkcompiler_ets_runtime has a buffer overflow vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS through buffer overflow.

item.title: CVE-2025-27241 · 3.3 LOW — multimedia_av_codec has a NULL pointer dereference vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through NULL pointer dereference.

item.title: CVE-2025-27248 · 3.3 LOW — ai_neural_network_runtime has a NULL pointer dereference vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through NULL pointer dereference.

item.title: CVE-2025-22886 · 3.3 LOW — distributeddatamgr_udmf has a memory leak vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through missing release of memory.

item.title: CVE-2025-27132 · 3.8 LOW — arkcompiler_ets_runtime has an out-of-bounds write vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker arbitrary code execution in pre-installed apps through out-of-bounds write. This vulnerability can be exploited only in restricted scenarios.

item.title: CVE-2025-25218 · 3.3 LOW — third_party_mksh has a NULL pointer dereference vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.3 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through NULL pointer dereference.

item.title: CVE-2025-27534 · 3.3 LOW — arkcompiler_ets_runtime has an out-of-bounds read vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.2 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through missing release of memory.

item.title: CVE-2025-25057 · 3.3 LOW — third_party_NuttX has a memory leak vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.2 and prior versions allow a local attacker case DOS through missing release of memory.

item.title: CVE-2025-24304 · 3.3 LOW — arkcompiler_ets_runtime has an out-of-bounds write vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.2 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS through out-of-bounds write.

item.title: CVE-2025-22851 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Liteos_A has an integer overflow vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.2 and prior versions allow a local attacker arbitrary code execution in pre-installed apps through integer overflow.

item.title: CVE-2025-22842 · 3.3 LOW — arkcompiler_ets_runtime has an out-of-bounds read vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.2 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS through out-of-bounds read.

item.title: CVE-2025-22452 · 3.3 LOW — arkcompiler_ets_runtime has an out-of-bounds read vulnerability
item.description: in OpenHarmony v5.0.2 and prior versions allow a local attacker cause DOS through out-of-bounds read.
